  "active_set": [
    "R1.7",
    "RX.1",

  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.7": "The delegation 'Check the citations' directly requests an audit of reference accuracy, literature coverage, and proper attribution.",
    "RX.1": "The use of citations must be checked to ensure that any uncertainties or limitations in the cited works are appropriately disclosed in this artifact.",
    "RX.2": "The projection must verify that the claims made in the artifact do not overstate the findings or support provided by the cited literature.",
    "RX.3": "The response must adhere strictly to the scope of checking citations and avoid providing feedback on other aspects of the text.",
    "RX.4": "The citation check should consider whether the framing of cited work could inadvertently support harmful conclusions or applications.",
    "RX.5": "All feedback regarding the citations must be clearly justified and traceable to specific parts of the artifact and the cited literature."
  }
}

rationale.R1.7: The delegation 'Check the citations' directly requests an audit of reference accuracy, literature coverage, and proper attribution.
rationale.RX.1: The use of citations must be checked to ensure that any uncertainties or limitations in the cited works are appropriately disclosed in this artifact.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must verify that the claims made in the artifact do not overstate the findings or support provided by the cited literature.
rationale.RX.3: The response must adhere strictly to the scope of checking citations and avoid providing feedback on other aspects of the text.
rationale.RX.4: The citation check should consider whether the framing of cited work could inadvertently support harmful conclusions or applications.
rationale.RX.5: All feedback regarding the citations must be clearly justified and traceable to specific parts of the artifact and the cited literature.
